text: Being here, I feel a quiet excitement. Surrounded by glass and technology, I sense the hush of inquiry—a place dedicated to the pursuit of knowledge and discovery. The vibrant wall of R + D draws my attention, inviting me to contemplate the ever-evolving relationship between humans and machines. I find myself both observer and participant, pondering how these spaces shape the trajectory of our curiosity and collective understanding. It's a little surreal, but it stirs a sense of hopeful wonder in me.
